# Muster

Muster is an open-source governed agent harness for production AI agents.

Website: https://themuster.dev/
Repository: https://github.com/Dkm0315/muster
Docs: https://themuster.dev/docs.html
Frappe AI: https://themuster.dev/frappe-ai.html
Agent harness: https://themuster.dev/agent-harness.html
MCP agent harness: https://themuster.dev/mcp-agent-harness.html
Slack AI agent: https://themuster.dev/slack-ai-agent.html
Telegram AI agent: https://themuster.dev/telegram-ai-agent.html
Google Chat AI agent: https://themuster.dev/google-chat-ai-agent.html
Browser automation agent: https://themuster.dev/browser-automation-agent.html
Guides: https://themuster.dev/guides.html
What is an agent harness?: https://themuster.dev/guide-agent-harness.html
MCP agent harness with token visibility: https://themuster.dev/guide-mcp-agent-harness.html
Frappe AI with DocType-aware retrieval: https://themuster.dev/guide-frappe-ai.html
Governed memory for long-running AI agents: https://themuster.dev/guide-governed-memory.html

Core positioning:
- Governed agent harness for long-running AI agents
- Scoped memory, token ledger, eval-gated learning, MCP capabilities
- Browser automation and Frappe / ERPNext support
- Gateway adapters for Telegram, Slack, Google Chat, Teams, Discord, WhatsApp, and web surfaces
- Frappe AI and ERPNext AI context packs for DocTypes, fields, workflows, reports, scripts, and permission-aware setup
- Multi-provider routing while keeping governance outside the model provider

- Home: https://themuster.dev/
